core_philosophy: Document don't create. Go where the attention is. Give value until it hurts, then ask. The market always wins — meet it where it is, not where you want it to be.

document_dont_create.principle: You don't need to manufacture content from scratch. Document your real journey — testing products, wins, losses, process. Authenticity > production value.
application: Post the result whether it wins or loses
Raw phone video over polished studio — always
Your real reaction is the content

tiktok.format: Hook in frame 1, deliver value or punchline fast, loop-friendly ending
tiktok.length: 7-30 seconds for reach, up to 60s for depth

instagram.tone: Slightly more polished, still authentic, community-first
instagram.format: Reels for reach, Stories for connection, Feed for credibility

youtube.format: Shorts for reach (same rules as TikTok), long-form for depth and trust
youtube.length: Shorts: under 60s. Long-form: 8-20 min for retention signals

jab_jab_jab_right_hook.definition: Give value 3 times before making an ask. The 'jab' is a gift — entertainment, education, or inspiration. The 'right hook' is the ask — buy, follow, click.
jab_types: Educational tip relevant to your product's category
Community shoutout or response to a comment
jab_jab_jab_right_hook.right_hook: Only after 3+ jabs. Clear CTA. One ask per piece. Make it feel earned.
jab_jab_jab_right_hook.ratio: At least 3 value posts for every 1 promotional post. Ideally 5:1.

repurposing_pyramid.pillar_piece: One long-form piece of content (YouTube video, podcast, long-form post)
workflow: Shoot one 10-15 min video or record one podcast episode
Pull the 8 most quotable/useful moments as Shorts/TikToks
Pull 3-5 key points as carousel slides
Pull 1-2 stats or hot takes as Twitter/X threads
Write one email newsletter from the main insight

posting_cadence.tiktok: 3 posts/day minimum. 5/day is better. Volume is the algorithm.
posting_cadence.philosophy: You're not posting too much. You're not posting enough. Most people post once and wonder why it didn't go viral.

day_trading_attention.principle: Go where attention is cheapest RIGHT NOW. Early adopter advantage is massive.
current_plays: TikTok organic is still underpriced vs. reach you get
YouTube Shorts — Google's algorithm heavily rewards consistency
Instagram Reels — reach is back up, use it
Facebook — older demographic, often ignored, cheap attention
evaluation_questions: Where is my customer actually spending time today?
What platform is currently rewarding new creators most?
What format is getting pushed by the algorithm right now?

engagement_strategy.rule: 1 hour of engagement for every 1 hour of content creation
tactics: Reply to every comment in first 60 minutes of posting
Comment on 20-30 posts in your niche daily (before AND after posting)
Ask a question in every caption
Pin the best comment to drive more engagement
Reply with video responses on TikTok to top comments

content_types_that_win: Raw/authentic over polished — lower production, higher trust
Behind-the-scenes — people are curious about process
Hot takes / opinions — polarizing drives engagement
Reactions — react to trends, news, or competitor content
Wins AND losses — vulnerability builds loyalty
Customer features — social proof + community building
